findings.description: The HTML has nested <main> elements. The document title 'MEMORANDUM' is rendered as h1, while the Roman numeral sections (I-IV) are rendered as h2. This is acceptable structurally, but the nested <main> tags are invalid HTML.
findings.evidence: The outer <body> contains <main>, and inside that there is another <main> element wrapping the document content.

findings.description: The page footer with the state address and phone number appears both in the header area of the HTML and as a page-footer div after the outline section, mirroring how the PDF repeats it on page 1. This is a minor duplication inherited from the source format.
findings.evidence: Footer text 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources / 1611 Mail service Center | Raleigh, North Carolina 27699-1611 / 919 707 9000' appears in both the header and as a page-footer div.
